title: Basic JavaScript Property Descriptors
description: Write a function that demonstrates the core concepts of JavaScript Property Descriptors. Focus on implementing Data descriptors (value, writable) correctly.

title: Intermediate JavaScript Property Descriptors
description: Create a function that uses Data descriptors (value, writable) and Accessor descriptors (get, set) together. Handle edge cases and validate inputs.

title: Advanced JavaScript Property Descriptors Project
description: Build a small application that applies Data descriptors (value, writable), Accessor descriptors (get, set), Enumerable and configurable in a real-world scenario. Include error handling and input validation.

title: Debugging JavaScript Property Descriptors
description: The following code has bugs related to Data descriptors (value, writable). Find and fix them.

title: Refactoring JavaScript Property Descriptors
description: Refactor the following code to use modern JavaScript patterns with Data descriptors (value, writable) and Accessor descriptors (get, set).
